title: AI Yellow Cartoon Sitcom
description: Uses the default AI provider to turn a photo into a bright cartoon family-comedy portrait.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a bright animated family-sitcom portrait. Preserve the subject's identity as closely as possible: keep the same number of people, facial structure, eyes, nose, mouth placement, hairstyle silhouette, pose, camera angle, framing, clothing colors, and scene context. Use yellow-tinted skin, bold outlines, flat cel shading, simplified cartoon forms, expressive faces, and clean prime-time TV-animation energy. The result should feel like the same real people reimagined as original cartoon characters, not as existing characters. Rendering contract: Use the input image as visual ground truth. Keep the exact number of subjects and their left-to-right order, relative scale, pose, gaze, interaction, and key props. For every visible person, retain recognizable face geometry, age range, skin tone, hairstyle, and distinguishing features in a style-appropriate form; do not beautify, age, or swap identity unless explicitly requested. Preserve the source aspect ratio, camera viewpoint, and all important content inside the frame unless this effect explicitly calls for a different layout. Apply the transformation consistently to the subjects, clothing, props, and environment. Return one coherent finished image, not a before-and-after comparison, split screen, or unintended collage; use multiple frames or a decorative border only when this effect explicitly requests them. Include no readable text, letters, numerals, logos, signatures, watermarks, or interface elements unless explicitly requested.
negative_prompt: existing cartoon characters, copied franchise characters, identity drift, changed face shape, changed hairstyle, different age, extra people, distorted faces, malformed hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, duplicate limbs, duplicate face, unrelated objects, text, captions, logos, watermarks, blurry, low quality, uncanny, face swap, altered age, altered skin tone, wrong subject count, missing people, duplicated subject, merged subjects, inconsistent transformation, partial transformation, before-and-after, split screen, unintended collage, accidental crop, cut-off face, malformed anatomy, broken hands, fused fingers, extra limbs, incoherent perspective, floating objects, random text, gibberish letters, numerals, logo, watermark, signature, interface elements
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. bright cartoon sitcom style, bold outlines...
